name: RV Connectivity Bundle (Starlink + Cellular Booster)
description:
Complete RV internet setup in one visit — Starlink installation paired with a cellular signal booster for redundant, reliable connectivity wherever you park. I mount and configure both systems so you've got satellite internet as your primary connection and a strong cellular backup, ideal for full-time RVers and remote workers on the road.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own Starlink kit and booster, just the kits with me supplying mounting hardware, or let me source everything for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Why book both instead of just one?
Starlink covers most situations, but tree cover, parking orientation, or temporary outages can leave you without internet. A cellular booster as backup means you're rarely fully offline.
Is this cheaper than booking the two services separately?
Booking them together saves a trip charge and lets me coordinate both installs efficiently in one visit. Ask about combined pricing when you book.
Can I add this to an existing Starlink or booster setup later?
Yes — if you already have one and want to add the other, just book the relevant standalone service instead.

name: Starlink Ground Pole Mount
description:
Custom ground pole installation for Starlink dishes requiring a clear line of sight — perfect for East Texas properties with trees, barns, or obstructed rooftops. Built to handle East Texas weather and set at the right angle the first time — no second trips for a bad sky view. I dig, set the pole, and mount the dish at the ideal angle and height. Available throughout Pittsburg TX and surrounding East Texas communities.

Frequently Asked Questions
Why would I need a ground pole instead of a roof mount?
Trees, barns, rooflines, and nearby structures can block the satellite signal Starlink needs. A ground pole lets me position the dish at the exact height and angle needed for a clear, unobstructed sky view on your specific property.
What is included in the ground pole installation?
I supply and set a steel ground pole in concrete, mount the Starlink dish at the optimal position, and route the cable cleanly back to your home or RV. The pole is permanent and built to handle East Texas weather.
Do you also connect the internet inside my home?
Yes. The ground pole mount is typically booked alongside a full Starlink installation. I run the cable inside and complete the full Wi-Fi network setup so everything is working before I leave.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own kit and pole/mounting hardware, just the Starlink kit with me supplying the pole and hardware, or let me source everything including the dish itself.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

name: Starlink Installation
description:
Professional Starlink installation for your home, RV, or rural property. Certified Starlink installer, hidden cabling, weatherproofed right the first time — I stand behind every install. I find the optimal location for the dish and router, run and route all cabling, weatherproof every penetration point, and set up your network so everything's working before I leave.

Three booking options to match what you've got: bring your own kit and hardware, bring just the Starlink kit and I'll supply mounting hardware, or let me handle sourcing everything.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to provide the Starlink kit?
Depends on the option you book. Choose the option that matches what you already have on hand.
Will the cable be hidden?
Yes. I route cable through walls, attics, or conduit wherever possible for a fully concealed run, and weatherproof every point where cable passes through an exterior surface.
What if I need a ground mount instead of a roof mount?
If your property has obstructions like trees or a roofline that blocks sky view, a ground pole mount may be the better option. Book that service separately, or mention it when you contact me and I'll advise on the best setup for your site.

name: Virtual Starlink Consultation
description:
Expert virtual consultation for Starlink Gen 3 and Mini systems — ideal for rural homeowners, RV travelers, and farmers across East Texas, Southwest Arkansas, Northwest Louisiana, and Southeast Oklahoma. A real conversation with the guy who'll actually show up if you need on-site help — not a script-reading call center. In this 60-minute video call, I troubleshoot connectivity issues, determine optimal dish placement for your property, and resolve speed or signal problems.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details and send your video link.

Frequently Asked Questions
What can you actually fix or diagnose remotely?
In most cases I can identify the root cause of slow speeds, dropped connections, obstruction issues, router placement problems, and app configuration errors entirely over video. I will tell you honestly if an on-site visit is needed.
What do I need for the video call?
A smartphone, tablet, or computer with a working camera and internet connection. I will send you a video link after booking. Being near your Starlink router and dish during the call is helpful.
Is the consultation fee credited toward an on-site install?
Yes. If the consultation leads to a booked on-site installation, the consultation fee is credited toward your install cost.

name: Wi-Fi Mesh & Network Extension
description:
Eliminate Wi-Fi dead zones permanently with a professionally configured mesh network. I size the system to your actual home and property, not just sell you whatever's in stock — dead zones gone, guaranteed. I install and optimize Eero, Google Nest, or Starlink Mesh nodes throughout your home so every room has a fast, reliable connection. Serving East Texas homeowners within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own mesh equipment, or let me source the right system for your home for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
How is a mesh system different from just adding a Wi-Fi extender?
Extenders create a separate, weaker network that your devices constantly fight over. A mesh system creates one seamless, intelligent network that automatically routes your devices to the strongest signal. The difference in real-world performance is significant.
Do I need to buy the equipment before booking?
Depends on the option you book. I can advise on the right system for your home size and Starlink or ISP setup either way.
Does this work with Starlink?
Yes. Starlink Mesh nodes are the cleanest option for Starlink customers, but Eero and Google Nest also work well with Starlink routers in bypass mode. I handle all the configuration.

name: Cellular Signal Booster Install
description:
Cellular signal booster installation (weBoost, SureCall) to eliminate dropped calls and slow data in rural East Texas dead zones. This is different from Wi-Fi — a cellular booster strengthens your phone's signal directly from the cell tower, independent of any internet connection. I mount the outside antenna, run cable to the inside unit, and tune for the strongest signal. East Texas, Southwest Arkansas, Northwest Louisiana, and Southeast Oklahoma.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own booster kit, just the booster with me supplying mounting hardware, or let me source the right system for your property.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
How is this different from Wi-Fi Mesh or Starlink?
Wi-Fi Mesh extends your home internet network. Starlink provides internet via satellite. A cellular booster strengthens your phone's direct cellular signal — useful even if you have great Wi-Fi but bad cell reception, like in a shop or barn away from the house.
Will this work on my property if I barely get any signal at all?
In most cases yes, as long as there's some usable signal outside to amplify. I'll do a signal check before booking if you're unsure — text me at 281-917-9914.
Does this work for all carriers?
Most boosters are carrier-agnostic and work across major carriers simultaneously, which I can confirm for your specific situation.

name: Ethernet Drop (Cat6)
description:
Hardwired Cat6 ethernet run through walls, attic, or crawl space for a single device — gaming systems, desktop PCs, smart TVs, or network equipment. Every drop is tested for full gigabit throughput before I leave — if it's not fast and clean, I'm not done. A wired connection eliminates lag and interference completely. Per drop. East Texas properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Why is a wired ethernet connection better than Wi-Fi?
A hardwired Cat6 connection delivers consistent gigabit speeds with zero wireless interference, no signal drops, and dramatically lower latency. For gaming, video calls, or any device that demands reliable connectivity, there is no substitute.
Do you fish the cable through the wall or run it along the baseboard?
I fish cables through walls, attics, and crawl spaces for a completely hidden run. I do not staple cables along baseboards. The finished result looks like the port was built into the wall originally.
What is included per drop?
Each drop includes the cable run, wall plate installation on both ends, and a speed test to confirm full gigabit throughput before I leave.

name: Home Network Diagnostic Visit
description:
In-person diagnostic visit for ongoing internet or Wi-Fi problems that need hands-on troubleshooting rather than a new installation. I test signal strength throughout your property, check router and modem health, identify interference sources, and give you a clear assessment of what's actually wrong — with honest recommendations, whether that's a quick fix or a bigger job like mesh installation. East Texas properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details and discuss what you're experiencing.

Frequently Asked Questions
How is this different from the Virtual Starlink Consultation?
The virtual consultation is a video call focused specifically on Starlink systems. This is an in-person visit for any internet or Wi-Fi issue, regardless of provider, where hands-on testing is needed.
If you find I need mesh Wi-Fi or new equipment, is that included?
No — this visit is diagnostic only. If the fix requires installation work like Wi-Fi Mesh & Network Extension, that's booked as a separate visit, and the diagnostic fee may be credited toward it.
What if the problem turns out to be on my ISP's end?
I'll tell you straight if the issue is with your provider rather than your home setup, so you're not paying for work that won't fix it.

name: Smart Doorbell/Security Camera Install
description:
Professional mounting, wiring, and mobile app configuration for Ring, Google Nest, and Arlo security cameras and video doorbells. I position every camera for real coverage, not just a pretty mount — and I won't leave until the app's actually working on your phone. Per device. Serving East Texas homes and rural properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own device and mounting hardware, just the device with me supplying mounting hardware, or let me source the device and hardware for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to buy the camera before booking?
Depends on the option you book. If you'd like me to source the device, let me know your property layout and I can advise on a good fit.
Do you run the wiring through the wall or leave it exposed?
I run wiring through the wall or soffit wherever possible for a clean, permanent installation. Surface-run wiring is used only where in-wall routing is not feasible, and it is done neatly with proper weatherproof conduit.
Can you install multiple cameras in one visit?
Yes. Book multiple devices and I will quote accordingly. Multi-camera installs in one visit are more efficient and save on trip fees.

name: Smart Home Device Setup
description:
Setup and network integration for smart home devices including smart plugs, smart switches, Alexa and Google Home hubs, and automated lighting systems. Most of my calls are "this is already installed but nothing talks to each other" — I fix that, and I make sure you understand how to use it before I go. I configure device groupings, routines, and voice control so your system actually works the way you want it to. Includes a user walkthrough. East Texas properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
My devices are already installed but nothing works together. Can you fix that?
Yes. This is one of the most common calls I get. I audit your existing setup, fix the app configuration and network pairing, set up automations and routines, and get everything talking to each other correctly.
Do you work with Alexa and Google Home?
Yes. I configure both ecosystems including device groupings, voice commands, and automation routines. I can also advise which ecosystem works better for your existing devices.
How long does a typical smart home setup take?
A basic setup of 3 to 5 devices including hub, plugs, and a couple of switches typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours. More complex setups with lighting, locks, and thermostats may take longer.

name: Smart Lock & Keyless Entry Install
description:
Physical deadbolt removal, smart lock installation, and complete mobile app configuration for Schlage, Kwikset, Yale, and August smart locks. You'll never get locked out on my watch — every install keeps a physical key and keypad backup, guaranteed. I handle the wiring, Z-Wave or Bluetooth pairing, and set up access codes before I leave. East Texas homes within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own lock and hardware, just the lock with me supplying any needed hardware, or let me source the lock for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do you supply the smart lock or do I need to buy it?
Depends on the option you book. If you'd like me to source the lock, let me know your preferences and I can advise.
Will a smart lock work with my existing door and frame?
Most smart locks are designed as direct deadbolt replacements and fit standard door prep. I will confirm compatibility before installation. If your door needs minor prep work I can handle that on site.
What if my Wi-Fi or hub goes down? Can I still get in?
Yes. All smart locks I install retain a physical key backup and a keypad code entry option so you are never locked out if the app or network has a problem.

name: Smart Thermostat Installation
description:
Smart thermostat installation and mobile app setup for Nest, Ecobee, and Honeywell systems. I check your HVAC wiring compatibility, mount the new thermostat, and configure scheduling and remote control on your phone before I leave. East Texas properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own thermostat, just the thermostat with me supplying any needed wiring adapters, or let me source one for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Will a smart thermostat work with my HVAC system?
Most systems are compatible, but some older systems lack a C-wire which smart thermostats need for power. I'll check your wiring during the visit and let you know if an adapter is needed.
Do you set up scheduling and remote access?
Yes. I configure your preferred schedule and get the mobile app working so you can control your thermostat from anywhere before I leave.
Can this integrate with my other smart home devices?
In most cases yes, especially within the Google Home or Alexa ecosystems. I can pair it with your existing setup during the same visit if you'd like.

name: Electrical Troubleshooting
description:
Professional electrical troubleshooting and installation in East Texas. I tell you straight what's wrong and what it costs to fix it — no diagnostic games, no upselling work you don't need. I handle ceiling fan wiring, light fixture installation, outlet and switch replacement, and circuit diagnostics for homeowners in Pittsburg TX, Texarkana, Tyler, Longview, and surrounding communities. All work done safely and to code.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
What kinds of electrical problems do you diagnose?
I troubleshoot dead outlets, tripped breakers that will not reset, flickering lights, fans that do not work after installation, GFCI issues, and wiring problems at the fixture or switch level. I do not perform full panel replacements or service entrance work — those require a licensed master electrician.
Do you work on older homes with aluminum wiring?
I am experienced with aluminum wiring found in older East Texas homes and use the appropriate connectors and techniques. I will flag any safety concerns I find during the visit.
How do I know if my issue is something you can fix?
Text or call 281-917-9914 with a description of the problem before booking. I will tell you straight whether it is within my scope or needs a licensed master electrician.

name: Outlet & Switch Upgrade
description:
Outlet and switch upgrades replacing outdated units with modern USB-A/C combo outlets, GFCI safety outlets, or contemporary rocker switches. Simple work done right: GFCI-tested, code-compliant, and priced honestly whether it's one outlet or twelve. Clean, professional installation per unit. Serving East Texas homeowners within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
What types of outlets can you upgrade to?
I install USB-A and USB-C combo outlets, GFCI safety outlets for kitchens and bathrooms, tamper-resistant outlets for child safety, and modern decora rocker-style switches and dimmers. All units fit standard electrical boxes.
How many outlets can you upgrade in one visit?
There is no limit per visit. Booking multiple units at once is more efficient and saves on trip fees. Let me know the quantity when booking.
Do GFCI outlets need to be installed by a specific type of contractor?
No. GFCI outlet installation is standard handyman electrical work that does not require a master electrician license in Texas. I install them correctly to code and test each one before leaving.

name: Whole-Home Surge Protection
description:
Panel-mounted whole-home surge protector installation to protect every outlet and device in your house from power surges — including the smart home gear, network equipment, and electronics you've already invested in. One protector at the panel covers the whole property, no per-room point protection needed. East Texas homes within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own surge protector unit, or let me source one for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Is this different from a power strip surge protector?
Yes, significantly. A panel-mounted unit protects your entire electrical system at the source, including hardwired appliances, HVAC, and anything plugged into any outlet in the house — not just what's plugged into one strip.
Do I need to supply the surge protector?
Depends on the option you book. I can source and install a quality unit, or install one you've already purchased.
Will this require shutting off power to my house?
Yes, briefly, while I make the panel connection. I'll coordinate timing with you in advance.

name: Ceiling Fan Installation
description:
Complete ceiling fan assembly and secure mounting by an experienced East Texas handyman. I've installed and wired dozens of fans across Camp, Titus, and Morris counties — clean work, no shortcuts, and no surprise charges when I'm done. I handle all electrical connections to existing junction boxes safely and correctly. Most installs completed in 1 to 2 hours.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own fan and mounting hardware, just the fan with me supplying mounting hardware, or let me source the fan and hardware for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to buy the fan before booking?
Depends on the option you book. If you choose an option where I supply the fan, let me know your preferences and I'll advise on a good fit for your ceiling height and junction box type.
My ceiling has no existing fan or light. Can you still install one?
This depends on whether there is a switched circuit available at the ceiling location. Text me at 281-917-9914 before booking and I can advise based on your specific situation.
Can you install a fan with a remote or smart control?
Yes. I can set up fan remote receivers and pair smart fan controllers like the Bond Bridge during the same visit.

name: Floodlight & Security Lighting
description:
Hardwired installation of exterior security floodlights and motion-activated lighting for driveways, garages, and property perimeters. I've wired lighting on East Texas homes, farms, and barns where "there's no power out there" usually just means nobody's run it yet — I'll get it there safely. I run the wiring, mount the fixture, and connect to your existing junction box or run a new circuit where needed. East Texas homes, farms, and rural properties within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own fixture and wiring materials, just the fixture with me supplying wiring materials, or let me source the fixture and materials for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to supply the floodlight fixture?
Depends on the option you book. Ring, Kasa, Defiant, and Lithonia are all common fixtures I work with regularly if you'd like me to source one.
What if there is no existing wiring where I want the light?
I can run new wiring from a nearby junction box or circuit to the fixture location. This is common on East Texas rural properties where outbuilding and perimeter lighting is being added fresh. Contact me before booking if you are unsure so I can quote accordingly.
Can you install motion sensor lights on a barn or detached garage?
Yes. Exterior outbuildings are a common install location. As long as there is power accessible nearby I can run the circuit and mount the fixture cleanly.

name: Light Fixture Installation
description:
Professional light fixture installation including mounting and secure wiring to your existing junction box. Older East Texas wiring throws curveballs — I've seen most of them, and I'll tell you upfront if something needs more than a standard install. Pendants, flush mounts, vanity bars, chandeliers, and outdoor fixtures all handled cleanly and correctly. Serving East Texas homeowners in Pittsburg TX, Daingerfield, Linden, Mount Pleasant, and surrounding areas.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own fixture and wiring supplies, just the fixture with me supplying wiring supplies, or let me source the fixture and supplies for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Do I need to supply the fixture?
Depends on the option you book. If you'd like me to source the fixture, let me know your style preferences and I can advise.
What if the existing wiring does not match my new fixture?
Older East Texas homes sometimes have wiring configurations that differ from modern fixtures. I identify and resolve compatibility issues on the spot in most cases. If the wiring requires more extensive work I will tell you before proceeding.
Can you install an outdoor light fixture?
Yes. Porch lights, garage lights, and exterior wall fixtures are common installs. I use weatherproof connections and proper outdoor-rated mounting for any exterior installation.

name: TV Mounting & Cable Concealment
description:
Professional TV mounting with fully concealed cabling — no power cords or HDMI cables hanging down your wall. I find solid mounting points, level and secure the bracket, and route all cables through the wall for a clean, finished look. I've hidden cable runs on dozens of jobs across East Texas — if it can be concealed, I'll find a way. Serving East Texas homeowners within a 200-mile radius of Pittsburg TX.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own TV mount and cables, just the TV with me supplying mount and cables, or let me source everything for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Will the cables actually be hidden, or just bundled?
I run cables through the wall cavity between the TV and a recessed power outlet whenever the wall allows it. This is a true concealed run, not just a cable sleeve.
Can you mount on brick, stone, or over a fireplace?
Yes. These mounts need additional anchoring and care, and I'll assess on site since material and wall type affect what hardware is needed.
Do you set up the TV itself (streaming devices, apps)?
I can pair streaming devices and do basic setup at your request. For deeper smart home integration, that's a separate Smart Home Device Setup visit.

name: RV Electrical Diagnostic & Repair
description:
Troubleshooting and repair for RV electrical issues — dead batteries, converter problems, 12V or 120V systems not working, outlets and breakers acting up inside your rig. I diagnose the actual problem instead of guessing, and fix what's within scope on the spot when possible.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details and discuss the issue.

Frequently Asked Questions
What kinds of RV electrical problems can you fix?
Dead or failing batteries, converter and inverter issues, faulty outlets and breakers, wiring problems between systems, and shore power connection issues are all within scope.
Do you work on both 12V and 120V systems?
Yes, both — most RV electrical problems involve the interaction between the two, and I check both during diagnosis.
What if the repair needs a part you don't have on hand?
I'll identify what's needed and either source it or let you know exactly what to get so we can finish the repair efficiently.

name: RV Pre-Trip / Pre-Purchase Inspection
description:
A thorough walk-through of your RV's critical systems before a big trip or before you buy a used rig. I check electrical connections, battery condition, propane line connections, slide-out mechanisms, roof seals, and shore power hookup — and give you a clear, honest written rundown of what's solid and what needs attention. As a full-time RVer myself, I know what actually breaks down on the road.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details and discuss what you need checked.

Frequently Asked Questions
Can you inspect an RV I'm about to buy from someone else?
Yes. Pre-purchase inspections are common and can save you from a costly surprise. I'll meet you at the seller's location if needed.
Do you check the engine or drivetrain on motorhomes?
No — this inspection covers RV-specific systems (electrical, propane, slides, seals, hookups). Engine and drivetrain inspection should go through a mechanic.
What if you find something that needs repair?
I'll tell you straight what I found. If it's something I can fix, we can schedule that separately. If it needs a specialist, I'll point you in the right direction.

name: RV Shore Power & Surge Protection Setup
description:
Shore power connection setup and surge protection installation for your RV — at your home base, a permanent site, or a rural property. I check your power pedestal or panel connection, install a surge protector rated for RV use, and verify your RV's electrical system is getting clean, safe power. Serving East Texas, Southwest Arkansas, Northwest Louisiana, and Southeast Oklahoma.

Choose the option that matches what you have on hand: your own RV surge protector, or let me source one for you.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details, finalize scope, and lock in your appointment.

Frequently Asked Questions
Is this the same as your Starlink Installation service?
No — this covers shore power and surge protection only. If you also want Starlink installed on your RV, book that separately or mention it when you contact me so we can schedule both in one visit.
Do I need a 30-amp or 50-amp surge protector?
This depends on your RV's electrical system. I'll confirm your amperage and recommend the right protector during the visit.
Can you also help with a permanent RV pad electrical setup?
Yes — if you're developing a homestead or RV pad and need a dedicated power run, mention this when booking so I can scope the full job.

name: RV Solar & Battery Consultation
description:
An on-site consultation to evaluate your RV's power needs and map out a solar and battery setup that actually fits how you use your rig — boondocking, seasonal travel, or full-time off-grid living. I'll assess your current system, discuss lithium vs. traditional battery options, and give you an honest recommendation and quote for the install. This is a consultation and quote visit, not the installation itself.

Heads up: the date and time you select is your requested appointment slot. I'll call or text you within a few hours of booking to confirm details and discuss your power needs.

Frequently Asked Questions
Will you install the system during this visit?
No — this visit is for assessment and quoting only. Once we've scoped the right system for your needs, installation is booked as a separate visit.
Do you recommend lithium or traditional batteries?
It depends on your usage, budget, and how you camp. I'll walk through the tradeoffs with you based on your actual situation rather than pushing one option.
I already have solar but it's not performing well. Can you diagnose that instead?
Yes — this visit also covers troubleshooting an underperforming existing system, not just new installs.
